metadata.name: Validate Story with Incremental Editing
metadata.description: 验证故事质量并使用增量编辑策略修复问题 - 避免大文件写入失败

workflow-instructions.overview:
本工作流使用增量编辑策略验证和修复故事文件,而不是重写整个文件。
**核心策略**: - 使用 Edit 工具针对性修改需要改进的部分 - 自动检测大文件并启用分块处理 - 按章节独立分析和修复 - 智能错误重试机制
**输入**: - story_key: 要验证的故事标识 (例如: "3-1-basic-authentication")
**输出**: - SUCCESS: 所有问题已修复并验证 - ISSUES_REMAIN: 无法修复所有问题 (附带详情) - FAILURE: 关键错误

execution-steps.step:
加载故事文件并分析其结构
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🔍 **Step 1: 加载和分析故事文件** ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Story: {{story_key}} File: {story_dir}/{{story_key}}.md
Load story file: {story_dir}/{{story_key}}.md Count total lines in file → {{total_lines}}
❌ **Error: Story file not found**
File: {story_dir}/{{story_key}}.md
Return FAILURE with error: "Story file not found"
Identify all markdown sections (##, ###, ####) Record line number ranges for each section Create {{section_map}} with structure: - section_title - section_level (2, 3, 4) - start_line - end_line - content_size (lines)
📊 **Large file detected: {{total_lines}} lines**
Enabling incremental editing mode...
Set {{use_incremental_mode}} = true
<check if="{{total_lines}} <= 1000"> Set {{use_incremental_mode}} = false 📊 File size: {{total_lines}} lines (standard mode)
✅ Story structure analyzed: - Total sections: {{section_count}} - Total lines: {{total_lines}} - Mode: {{use_incremental_mode ? "Incremental" : "Standard"}}

step.name: load-validation-checklist

check.output: ⚠️ **Warning: Checklist not found, using default criteria**

step.action: Group criteria by section type (e.g., "Story Overview", "Acceptance Criteria", etc.)

step.name: analyze-sections
step.description: 对每个章节独立分析质量问题

loop.action: Apply relevant validation criteria to section

check.action: For each issue, record: - issue_id: unique identifier - section: {{section.title}} - line_range: {{section.start_line}}-{{section.end_line}} - severity: CRITICAL | MEDIUM | LOW - category: missing_content | unclear | formatting | structure | completeness - description: what is wrong - fix_strategy: how to fix - estimated_lines: number of lines to edit

check.output:
✅ **No issues found - story quality is excellent!**
Validation complete.

step.name: apply-fixes-incrementally
step.description: 使用增量编辑策略应用修复

check.output:
✅ **All issues resolved!**
Story quality is now excellent.
❌ Critical issues still present. Manual intervention required.
check.action: Generate detailed report of remaining issues

check.output: ✅ No critical issues remain. Story quality is acceptable.

step.name: generate-report

on-error.action: Return FAILURE with error: "Story file not found"
Return FAILURE with error: "File integrity check failed"
Retry with reduced chunk size (up to 3 times)
If still fails, skip this fix and continue

value.name: SUCCESS
value.description: All issues fixed and validated, or only minor issues remain

value.name: ISSUES_REMAIN
value.description: Could not fix all issues, critical issues still present
value.details: List of remaining issues with severity and description

value.name: FAILURE
value.description: Critical error occurred (file not found, corrupted, etc.)
value.error: Error message describing what went wrong
